description_long: This is a stylized biplane with a compact fuselage and two sets of staggered wings, painted in teal and dark gray with subtle maroon accents. The front features a large wooden propeller and an open engine mount, while the cockpit is positioned just behind the upper wing, likely designed for a single pilot. The tail section includes a vertical stabilizer with a cross insignia and a horizontal stabilizer, both matching the main color scheme. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail skid, all fixed and non-retractable. The wings are straight with no visible dihedral or winglets, and the overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century fighter aircraft. The surface appears to be made primarily of metal with some wooden and glass components, giving it a robust yet vintage appearance.
description: A compact, vintage-style biplane with teal and dark gray coloring, wooden propeller, and fixed landing gear. Features an open cockpit and classic cross insignia on the tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the staggered biplane wings, open cockpit, and wooden propeller at the front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual wings, central propeller, and narrow fuselage profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail section with cross insignia and the layered wing structure.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the full wingspan, tail assembly, and overall biplane layout.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, staggered wings mounted at mid and low positions; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing.
